mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_FACTORY ( FACTORYCD, PLANTCD, FACTORYNM, USEYN, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM ) VALUES ( #{FACTORYCD}, #{PLANTCD}, #{FACTORYNM}, #{USEYN}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_COM_FACTORY SET USEYN = 0, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE FACTORYCD = #{FACTORYCD}
